headingDesc: Sii xisaabtahankaaga, maareeyaha hawlgalka, ama iibsadaha muuqaalkooda gaarka ah — kaliya waxa ay u baahan yihiin. Guji door si aad u aragto oggolaanshaha faahfaahsan.
emptyMembers: Weli xubno kooxeed ma jiraan. Ku casuun xisaabtahankaaga, maareeyaha hawlgalka, ama la-aasaasaha.
roleOwnerDesc: Gelitaan buuxa oo wax walba ah
roleOwnerWho: Milkiilaha ganacsiga ama aasaasaha. Hal urur kasta mid.
roleOwnerUseCase0: Wuxuu maareeyaa biilasha, kooxda, iyo dhammaan dejinta
roleOwnerUseCase1: Xakameyn buuxa oo ku saabsan xiritaannada xogta iyo isdhexgalka
roleOwnerUseCase2: Wuu tirtiri karaa xogta, ka saari karaa xubnaha, oo joojin karaa qorshayaasha
roleAdminDesc: Gelitaan buuxa + wuu casuumi karaa xubno
roleAdminWho: La-aasaase la aaminay, maareeye hawlgal, ama shariik sare.
roleAdminCannotAccess0: Ma beddeli karo biilasha ama joojin karo rukunta
roleAdminUseCase0: Wuu casuumaa oo maareeyaa xubnaha kooxda
roleAdminUseCase2: Gelitaan hawlgal buuxa oo dhammaan qalabka sirdoonka
roleAnalystDesc: Akhri iyo qor, biil ma jiro
roleAnalystWho: Xubin kooxeed oo xog aqoon u leh oo wax ka qabata warbixinnada oo falanqeeya isbeddellada.
roleAnalystCannotAccess0: Ma casuumi karo ama ka saari karo xubnaha kooxda
roleAnalystCannotAccess1: Ma geli karo biilasha ama rukunta
roleAnalystCannotAccess2: Ma xiri karo ama ka fujin karo ilaha xogta
roleAnalystCannotAccess3: Ma beddeli karo kaydka POS ama dejinta
roleAnalystUseCase0: Wuu wax ka qabtaa falanqayn AI ku shaqeysa oo kaydiyaa warbixinnada
roleAnalystUseCase1: Wuu la socdaa daashboodhyada, digniinaha, iyo waxyaabaha aan caadiga ahayn
roleAnalystUseCase2: Wuu abuuraa saadaal iyo cilmi-baaris fursado balaarin ah
roleAccountantDesc: Kaliya xogta maaliyadeed iyo warbixinnada CFO
roleAccountantWho: Xisaabtahankaaga dibadda, xisaab-hayaha, ama la-taliyaha maaliyadeed.
roleAccountantCannotAccess0: Ma geli karo daashboodhyo ama qalab aan maaliyad ahayn
roleAccountantCannotAccess1: Ma arki karo dhaqdhaqaaqyada POS ama kaydka
roleAccountantCannotAccess2: Ma maareyn karo kooxda, biilasha, ilaha xogta, ama dejinta
roleAccountantCannotAccess3: Ma geli karo qalabka alaab-qeybiyaha ama balaarinta
roleAccountantUseCase0: Wuu dib u eegaa kooban P&L iyo warbixinnada muddada lacagta
roleAccountantUseCase1: Wuu wax ka qabtaa warbixinnada Habka CFO ee diyaarinta guddiga
roleAccountantUseCase2: Wuu weydiiyaa su'aalo maaliyadeed oo ku saabsan dakhliga, faa'iidada, iyo socodka lacagta
roleBuyerWho: Maareeye iibsasho, hoggaamiye iibsasho, ama xakameeyaha kaydka.
roleBuyerCannotAccess0: Ma geli karo warbixinnada maaliyadeed ama Habka CFO
roleBuyerCannotAccess1: Ma maareyn karo kooxda, biilasha, ama dejinta
roleBuyerCannotAccess2: Ma xiri karo ama ka fujin karo ilaha xogta
roleBuyerCannotAccess3: Ma arki karo xogta dakhliga ama faa'iidada
roleBuyerUseCase0: Wuu maareeyaa heerarka kaydka, dhibcaha dib-u-dalabka, iyo digniinaha kaydka
roleBuyerUseCase1: Wuu isticmaalaa qalabka Kaararka Qiimaynta Alaab-qeybiyaha iyo Qiimaha Guud ee la Keenay
roleBuyerUseCase2: Wuu weydiiyaa su'aalo AI oo ku saabsan kaydka, alaab-qeybiyayaasha, iyo iibsashada
roleViewerWho: Maalgeliye, la-taliye, ama xubin guddi oo u baahan aragti aan wax lagu beddelin.
roleViewerCannotAccess0: Ma abuuri karo, wax ka beddeli karo, ama tirtiri karo wax kasta
roleViewerCannotAccess1: Ma weydiin karo su'aalo AI (kaliya wuu eegi karaa jawaabaha la kaydiyay)
roleViewerCannotAccess2: Ma geli karo dejinta, biilasha, kooxda, ama ilaha xogta
roleViewerUseCase0: Wuu eegaa daashboodhyada iyo warbixinnada la kaydiyay
roleViewerUseCase1: Wuu la socdaa dhibcaha Business Pulse iyo KPI-yada
roleViewerUseCase2: Wuu dib u eegaa kooban CFO oo diyaar u ah guddiga
